mcp:local-semgrep:semgrep_scan_with_cust.what_is_it: Local Semgrep 提供的 `semgrep_scan_with_custom_rule` MCP Tool。

mcp:local-semgrep:semgrep_scan.what_is_it: Local Semgrep 提供的 `semgrep_scan` MCP Tool。

mcp:local-semgrep:semgrep_scan_supply_ch.what_is_it: Local Semgrep 提供的 `semgrep_scan_supply_chain` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-semgrep:semgrep_scan_supply_ch.purpose: 检查项目依赖与供应链风险。
mcp:local-semgrep:semgrep_scan_supply_ch.when_to_use: 存在依赖清单或锁文件，需要识别已知易受攻击组件时。

(called SemgrepError in error.py)

'error_type' below should be mostly backward compatible thx to the <json

CliMatchExtra.description:
Original type: cli_match_extra = { ... }

:param message: Those fields are derived from the rule but the
metavariables they contain have been expanded to their concrete value.
:param metadata: fields coming from the rule
:param fingerprint: Since 1.98.0, you need to be logged in to get those
fields
:param metavars: Since 1.98.0, you need to be logged in to get this field.
note: we also need ?metavars because dependency_aware code
:param fix: If present, semgrep was able to compute a string that should
be inserted in place of the text in the matched range in order to fix the
finding. Note that this is the result of applying both the fix: or
fix_regex: in a rule.
:param is_ignored: for nosemgrep
:param sca_info: EXPERIMENTAL: added by dependency_aware code
:param validation_state: EXPERIMENTAL: If present indicates the status of
postprocessor validation. This field not being present should be
equivalent to No_validator. Added in semgrep 1.37.0
:param historical_info: EXPERIMENTAL: added by secrets post-processing &
historical scanning code Since 1.60.0.
:param dataflow_trace: EXPERIMENTAL: For now, present only for taint
findings. May be extended to others later on.
:param extra_extra: EXPERIMENTAL: see core_match_extra.extra_extra
CliMatchExtra.title: CliMatchExtra

CliOutputSubprojectInfo.description:
Original type: cli_output_subproject_info = { ... }

This is the public version of subproject_stats, which is used in the CLI
output. This is distinguised from subproject_stats below in order to
produce more normal-looking JSON and to avoid including unnecessary
fields.

:param dependency_sources: We use fpath here rather than the
dependency_source_file type because ATD makes strange-looking JSON output
for the dependency_source_file type.
:param resolved: true if the subproject's dependencies were resolved
successfully
:param unresolved_reason: Reason why resolution failed, empty if
resolution succeeded
:param resolved_stats: Results of dependency resolution, empty if
resolution failed

DependencyMatch.description:
Original type: dependency_match = { ... }

:param dependency_paths: All known dependency paths by which the matched
(transitive) dependency was introduced into the project. Each path is
ordered from the direct dependency that introduced it (node 0) to the
matched (transitive) dependency (last node). Computed locally from the
resolved dependency graph at scan time; only populated when
dependency-graph (path-to-transitivity) resolution ran for the ecosystem.
Empty/absent for direct dependencies or ecosystems without graph
resolution. The number of paths per match is capped. EXPERIMENTAL since
1.166.0

EngineOfFinding.description:
Original type: engine_of_finding = [ ... ]

Report the engine used to detect each finding. Additionally, if we are
able to infer that the finding could only be detected using the pro
engine, report that the pro engine is required and include basic
information about which feature is required.

    OSS = ran with OSS
    PRO = ran with PRO, but we didn't infer that OSS couldn't have found this
    finding
    PRO_REQUIRED = ran with PRO and requires a PRO feature (see pro_feature_used)

Note: OSS and PRO could have clearer names, but for backwards
compatibility we're leaving them as is

FoundDependency.description:

:param allowed_hashes: ???
:param manifest_path: Path to the manifest file that defines the project

Original type: matching_explanation_extra = { ... }

For any "extra" information that we cannot fit at the node itself. This is
useful for kind-specific information, which we cannot put in the operation
itself without giving up our ability to derive `show` (needed for
`matching_operation` below).

:param before_negation_matches: Only present in And kind. This information
is useful for determining the input matches to the first Negation node.
:param before_filter_matches: Only present in nodes which have children
Filter nodes. This information is useful for determining the input matches
to the first Filter node, as there is otherwise no way of obtaining the
post-intersection matches in an And node, for instance

Profile.description:
Original type: profile = { ... }

Run locally $ ./run-benchmarks --dummy --upload

:param rules: List of rules, including the one read but not run on any
target. This list is actually more an array which allows other fields to
reference rule by number instead of rule_id (e.g., match_times further
below) saving space in the JSON.

Upgrade note: this used to be defined as a rule_id_dict where each rule_id
was inside a {id: rule_id; ...} record so we could give parsing time info
about each rule, but parsing one rule was never the slow part, so now we
just juse the aggregated rules_parse_time below and do not need a complex
rule_id_dict record anymore.
:param parsing_time: EXPERIMENTAL
:param scanning_time: EXPERIMENTAL
:param matching_time: EXPERIMENTAL
:param tainting_time: EXPERIMENTAL
:param fixpoint_timeouts: EXPERIMENTAL: Dafatlow fixpoint-function
timeouts

Happen more often than we would like, and it's mainly Semgrep devs that
will use this info for debugging, so for now we are reporting these
timeouts as part of the profiling report.
:param max_memory_bytes: maximum amount of memory used by Semgrep(-core)
during its execution
Profile.title: Profile

:param total_time: Total clock time in seconds. Divide by the count to get

Transitive.description:
Original type: dependency_kind = [ ... | Transitive | ... ]

we depend indirectly (transitively) on the 3rd-party library (e.g., if we
use lodash which itself uses internally log4j then lodash is a Direct
dependency and log4j a Transitive one)

alt: Indirect
Transitive.title: Transitive

TransitiveReachable.description:
Original type: transitive_reachable = { ... }

:param matches: The matches we found in 3rd party libraries. Ideally the
location in cli_match are relative to the root of the project so one can
display matches as package@/path/to/finding.py
:param callgraph_reachable: LATER: add callgraph information so one can
see the path from 1st party code to the vulnerable intermediate 3rd party
function. This is set to None for now.

TransitiveReachable_.description:
Original type: sca_match_kind = [ ... | TransitiveReachable of ... | ... ]

found the pattern-part of the SCA rule in third-party code and ultimately
found a path from 1st party code to this vulnerable third-party code. The
goal of transitive reachability analysis is to change some Undetermined or
(LockfileOnlyMatch Transitive) into TransitiveReachable or
TransitiveUnreachable
TransitiveReachable_.title: TransitiveReachable_

TransitiveUndetermined_.description:
Original type: sca_match_kind = [ ... | TransitiveUndetermined of ... | ... ]

could not decide because of the engine limitations (e.g., found the use of
a vulnerable library in the lockfile but could not find the pattern in
first party code and could not access third-party code for further
investigation (similar to (LockfileOnlyMatch Transitive))
TransitiveUndetermined_.title: TransitiveUndetermined_

TransitiveUnreachable.description:
Original type: transitive_unreachable = { ... }

:param analyzed_packages: We didn't find any findings in all the 3rd party
libraries that are using the 3rd party vulnerable library. This is a
"proof of work".
:param explanation: some extra explanation that the user can understand
TransitiveUnreachable.title: TransitiveUnreachable

TransitiveUnreachable_.description:
Original type: sca_match_kind = [ ... | TransitiveUnreachable of ... | ... ]

This is a "positive" finding in the sense that semgrep was able to prove
that the transitive finding is "safe" and can be ignored because either
there is no call to the pattern-part of the SCA rule in 3rd party code, or
if there is it's in third-party code that is not accessed from the
1st-party code (e.g., via callgraph analysis) Note that there is no need
for DirectUnreachable because semgrep would never generate such a finding.
We have TransitiveUnreachable because semgrep first generates some
Undetermined that we then retag as DirectUnreachable.
TransitiveUnreachable_.title: TransitiveUnreachable_

Unknown.description:
Original type: dependency_kind = [ ... | Unknown | ... ]

If there is insufficient information to determine the transitivity, such
as a requirements.txt file without a requirements.in manifest, we leave it
Unknown.
Unknown.title: Unknown

UnresolvedDisabled.description:
Original type: unresolved_reason = [ ... | UnresolvedDisabled | ... ]

Resolution was not attempted because a required feature (such as local
builds) was disabled.
UnresolvedDisabled.title: UnresolvedDisabled

UnresolvedFailed.description:
Original type: unresolved_reason = [ ... | UnresolvedFailed | ... ]

Resolution was attempted, but was unsuccessful.
UnresolvedFailed.title: UnresolvedFailed

UnresolvedSkipped.description:
Original type: unresolved_reason = [ ... | UnresolvedSkipped | ... ]

Resolution was skipped because the dependency source was not relevant to
the scanned targets.
UnresolvedSkipped.title: UnresolvedSkipped

UnresolvedUnsupported.description:
Original type: unresolved_reason = [ ... | UnresolvedUnsupported | ... ]

Resolution was skipped because the dependency source is not supported.
UnresolvedUnsupported.title: UnresolvedUnsupported

ValidationState.description:
Original type: validation_state = [ ... ]

This type is used by postprocessors for secrets to report back the
validity of a finding. No_validator is currently also used when no
validation has yet occurred, which if that becomes confusing we could
adjust that, by adding another state.
ValidationState.title: ValidationState

VerySlowStats.description:
Original type: very_slow_stats = { ... }

These ratios are numbers in [0, 1], and we would hope that both
'time_ratio' and 'count_ratio' are very close to 0. In bad cases, we may
see the 'count_ratio' being close to 0 while the 'time_ratio' is above
0.5, meaning that a small number of very slow files/etc represent a large
amount of the total processing time. EXPERIMENTAL

:param time_ratio: Ratio "sum of very slow time" / "total time"
:param count_ratio: Ratio "very slow count" / "total count"
VerySlowStats.title: VerySlowStats

XPat.description:
Original type: matching_operation = [ ... | XPat of ... | ... ]

XPat for eXtended pattern. Can be a spacegrep pattern, a regexp pattern,
or a proper semgrep pattern. see semgrep-core/src/core/XPattern.ml
XPat.title: XPat

mcp:local-wiremcp:capture_packets.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `capture_packets` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:capture_packets.purpose: 使用 TShark 捕获指定接口上的网络数据包。
mcp:local-wiremcp:capture_packets.when_to_use: 仅在已授权接口上需要采集短时流量样本时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:capture_packets.input_data: `interface`（string，可选，Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)）；`duration`（number，可选，Capture duration in seconds）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:capture_packets.output_data: 返回捕获状态、PCAP 路径、包数量或错误。

interface.description: Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)

mcp:local-wiremcp:get_summary_stats.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `get_summary_stats` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_summary_stats.purpose: 汇总 PCAP 的包数、协议和时间范围。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_summary_stats.when_to_use: 开始深度取证前需要快速了解流量样本时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_summary_stats.input_data: `interface`（string，可选，Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)）；`duration`（number，可选，Capture duration in seconds）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_summary_stats.output_data: 返回协议分布、包数、字节数和时间统计。

interface.description: Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)

mcp:local-wiremcp:get_conversations.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `get_conversations` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_conversations.purpose: 提取 PCAP 中的主机与端口会话。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_conversations.when_to_use: 需要识别主要通信双方、连接方向和流量规模时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_conversations.input_data: `interface`（string，可选，Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)）；`duration`（number，可选，Capture duration in seconds）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:get_conversations.output_data: 返回会话端点、包数、字节数和持续时间。

interface.description: Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)

mcp:local-wiremcp:check_threats.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `check_threats` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_threats.purpose: 用规则检查 PCAP 中的可疑网络行为。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_threats.when_to_use: 需要初筛扫描、异常协议或可疑通信模式时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_threats.input_data: `interface`（string，可选，Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)）；`duration`（number，可选，Capture duration in seconds）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_threats.output_data: 返回威胁匹配、证据字段和风险摘要。

interface.description: Network interface to capture from (e.g., eth0, en0)

mcp:local-wiremcp:check_ip_threats.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `check_ip_threats` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_ip_threats.purpose: 检查指定 IP 在 PCAP 中的相关活动。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_ip_threats.when_to_use: 已有可疑 IP，需要回溯其通信和行为时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:check_ip_threats.output_data: 返回相关会话、包和威胁判断。

mcp:local-wiremcp:analyze_pcap.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `analyze_pcap` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:analyze_pcap.purpose: 对已有 PCAP 执行综合协议与安全分析。
mcp:local-wiremcp:analyze_pcap.when_to_use: 需要对捕获文件形成整体取证摘要时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:analyze_pcap.input_data: `pcapPath`（string，必填，Path to the PCAP file to analyze (e.g., ./demo.pcap)）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:analyze_pcap.output_data: 返回协议、端点、会话、异常和分析摘要。

pcapPath.description: Path to the PCAP file to analyze (e.g., ./demo.pcap)

mcp:local-wiremcp:extract_credentials.what_is_it: Local WireMCP 提供的 `extract_credentials` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-wiremcp:extract_credentials.purpose: 从授权 PCAP 中识别明文凭据迹象。
mcp:local-wiremcp:extract_credentials.when_to_use: 调查弱协议或凭据泄漏风险时。
mcp:local-wiremcp:extract_credentials.input_data: `pcapPath`（string，必填，Path to the PCAP file to analyze (e.g., ./demo.pcap)）。
mcp:local-wiremcp:extract_credentials.output_data: 返回协议、位置和脱敏后的凭据证据；不得返回可复用秘密。

pcapPath.description: Path to the PCAP file to analyze (e.g., ./demo.pcap)

mcp:local-security-extended:extended_too.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `extended_tool_versions` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:extended_too.purpose: 检查第一、第二批扩展安全工具的固定版本、路径和安装状态。
mcp:local-security-extended:extended_too.when_to_use: Agent 选择扩展 Tool 前，或诊断工具不可用、版本不匹配时。
mcp:local-security-extended:extended_too.output_data: 返回每个组件的 `version`、`path` 和 `installed`。

mcp:local-security-extended:trivy_scan.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `trivy_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:trivy_scan.purpose: 扫描文件系统中的依赖漏洞、错误配置和泄密内容。
mcp:local-security-extended:trivy_scan.when_to_use: 需要审计源码、构建目录、基础设施配置或依赖清单时。
mcp:local-security-extended:trivy_scan.output_data: 返回执行状态、Trivy JSON 发现和原始结果文件路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:osv_scan.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `osv_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:osv_scan.purpose: 依据 OSV 数据库检查源码目录或锁文件中的开源依赖漏洞。
mcp:local-security-extended:osv_scan.when_to_use: 项目包含包管理器清单或锁文件，需要补充供应链漏洞证据时。
mcp:local-security-extended:osv_scan.output_data: 返回执行状态、OSV JSON 漏洞结果和结果文件路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:yara_scan.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `yara_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:yara_scan.purpose: 使用调用方提供的 YARA 规则匹配本地文件或目录。
mcp:local-security-extended:yara_scan.when_to_use: 已有可信检测规则，需要对样本、解包目录或取证文件做签名检查时。
mcp:local-security-extended:yara_scan.output_data: 返回退出状态、规则匹配证据行、stdout 和 stderr。

mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_p.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `volatility_plugins` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_p.purpose: 列出并筛选 Volatility 3 内存取证插件。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_p.when_to_use: 分析内存镜像前，需要为操作系统和证据目标选择正确插件时。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_p.output_data: 返回插件名称和帮助文本。

mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_a.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `volatility_analyze` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_a.purpose: 对内存镜像运行指定 Volatility 3 插件。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_a.when_to_use: 已确认镜像路径和插件名称，需要提取进程、网络、模块等内存证据时。
mcp:local-security-extended:volatility_a.output_data: 返回插件 JSON 结果、退出状态和诊断文本。

mcp:local-security-extended:ghidra_headl.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `ghidra_headless_analyze` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:ghidra_headl.purpose: 用 Ghidra Headless 导入并自动分析一个本地二进制文件。
mcp:local-security-extended:ghidra_headl.when_to_use: 需要建立反汇编、函数和引用分析基础，且不依赖 GUI 会话时。
mcp:local-security-extended:ghidra_headl.output_data: 返回分析日志、退出状态、耗时和隔离工程目录。

mcp:local-security-extended:gdb_inspect.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `gdb_inspect` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:gdb_inspect.purpose: 用 GNU GDB batch 模式静态查看二进制文件、节区、函数或 main 反汇编。
mcp:local-security-extended:gdb_inspect.when_to_use: 需要快速核对二进制布局和符号，且不需要运行目标进程时。
mcp:local-security-extended:gdb_inspect.output_data: 返回 GDB stdout、stderr、退出状态和耗时。

mcp:local-security-extended:mitmproxy_fl.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `mitmproxy_flow_summary` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:mitmproxy_fl.purpose: 离线读取 mitmproxy flow 文件并汇总 HTTP 会话。
mcp:local-security-extended:mitmproxy_fl.when_to_use: 已有授权采集的 flow 文件，需要检查方法、主机、状态码和请求响应元数据时。
mcp:local-security-extended:mitmproxy_fl.output_data: 返回脱敏后的 flow 摘要、最多 1000 条会话和 JSON Artifact。

mcp:local-security-extended:subfinder_di.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `subfinder_discover` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:subfinder_di.purpose: 对授权域名执行被动子域发现。
mcp:local-security-extended:subfinder_di.when_to_use: 资产盘点需要利用公开情报源扩展域名范围时。
mcp:local-security-extended:subfinder_di.output_data: 返回 Subfinder JSONL 记录、执行状态和结果文件路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:dnsx_resolve.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `dnsx_resolve` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:dnsx_resolve.purpose: 批量解析主机名并收集 DNS 记录。
mcp:local-security-extended:dnsx_resolve.when_to_use: 已有主机名列表，需要确认可解析资产和地址映射时。
mcp:local-security-extended:dnsx_resolve.output_data: 返回 dnsx JSONL 记录、执行状态和结果文件路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:naabu_scan.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `naabu_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:naabu_scan.purpose: 对授权主机或 CIDR 执行 TCP 端口发现。
mcp:local-security-extended:naabu_scan.when_to_use: 资产发现阶段需要快速确定开放端口，再交给 Nmap 深入识别时。
mcp:local-security-extended:naabu_scan.output_data: 返回端口 JSONL 记录、执行状态和结果文件路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:zap_baseline.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `zap_baseline_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:zap_baseline.purpose: 用 OWASP ZAP Quick Scan 执行 Web 基线扫描。
mcp:local-security-extended:zap_baseline.when_to_use: 授权 Web 目标需要动态检查常见风险并生成可审阅报告时。
mcp:local-security-extended:zap_baseline.output_data: 返回执行状态、进度日志和 HTML 报告路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:binwalk_scan.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `binwalk_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:binwalk_scan.purpose: 识别固件或二进制中的嵌入文件签名，可选计算熵。
mcp:local-security-extended:binwalk_scan.when_to_use: 固件、磁盘片段或未知二进制需要识别压缩包、文件系统和高熵区域时。
mcp:local-security-extended:binwalk_scan.output_data: 返回 Binwalk 匹配、偏移、诊断信息和执行状态。

mcp:local-security-extended:capa_analyze.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `capa_analyze` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:capa_analyze.purpose: 用 capa 规则识别可执行文件表现出的程序能力。
mcp:local-security-extended:capa_analyze.when_to_use: 恶意代码或未知程序需要快速形成行为能力假设时。
mcp:local-security-extended:capa_analyze.output_data: 返回 capa JSON 规则匹配、元数据、执行状态和结果路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:floss_extrac.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `floss_extract` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:floss_extrac.purpose: 从可执行文件提取和解码静态、栈、紧凑及混淆字符串。
mcp:local-security-extended:floss_extrac.when_to_use: 普通 strings 无法充分揭示恶意样本配置、URL 或命令文本时。
mcp:local-security-extended:floss_extrac.output_data: 返回 FLOSS JSON 字符串分类、执行状态和结果路径。

mcp:local-security-extended:oletools_ana.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `oletools_analyze` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:oletools_ana.purpose: 使用 oleid、olevba 或 rtfobj 分析 Office/OLE/RTF 文件。
mcp:local-security-extended:oletools_ana.when_to_use: 文档样本需要检查宏、嵌入对象、格式异常和可疑指标时。
mcp:local-security-extended:oletools_ana.output_data: 返回分析器输出、退出状态；olevba 同时返回解析后的 JSON。

mcp:local-security-extended:checksec_bin.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `checksec_binary` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:checksec_bin.purpose: 检查 ELF 的 RELRO、Canary、NX、PIE 等编译保护。
mcp:local-security-extended:checksec_bin.when_to_use: Pwn 或二进制审计开始时，需要确定利用约束和保护基线时。
mcp:local-security-extended:checksec_bin.output_data: 返回 checksec JSON、执行状态和诊断文本。

mcp:local-security-extended:ropgadget_sc.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `ropgadget_scan` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:ropgadget_sc.purpose: 从二进制中搜索 ROP、JOP 或系统调用 gadgets。
mcp:local-security-extended:ropgadget_sc.when_to_use: 已获授权的漏洞利用研究需要构造控制流链并核对可用指令片段时。
mcp:local-security-extended:ropgadget_sc.output_data: 返回 gadget 地址与指令、唯一数量、执行状态和诊断文本。

mcp:local-security-extended:pwntools_elf.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `pwntools_elf_summary` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwntools_elf.purpose: 用 pwntools 解析 ELF 架构、入口点、保护、节区和符号。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwntools_elf.when_to_use: Pwn 任务需要在编写交互或利用脚本前建立结构化二进制概况时。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwntools_elf.output_data: 返回 ELF JSON 摘要、checksec 结果、节区和最多 500 个符号。

mcp:local-security-extended:pwndbg_check.what_is_it: Local Security Extended 提供的 `pwndbg_check` MCP Tool。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwndbg_check.purpose: 检查独立 Ubuntu 中 Pwndbg 能否被 GDB 正常加载。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwndbg_check.when_to_use: 动态调试任务开始前确认 Pwndbg 运行环境，或诊断插件加载问题时。
mcp:local-security-extended:pwndbg_check.output_data: 返回 GDB/Pwndbg 加载输出、退出状态和耗时。
